Dyffryn Farm beautiful characterful 17th Century Farmhouse, located Upper Valley Cambrian Mountains, area outstanding natural beauty offering spectacular views.
farmhouse traditional Welsh longhouse over years seen some amazing transformations.
Parts Farmhouse have been converted into separate cottages which 'The Stable' been created offer guest accommodation.
Dyffryn only place visit during summer months there's plenty outdoor year around.
turning seasons true delight.
spring flowers bloom fields fill with newborn lambs.
autumn hills ablaze with purple, orange bracken heather turn perfect autumnal walks cycles.
winter relax front fire cozy cottage after winter walk!
